data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: merge commit 58417a2f and impl commit 2d6c7016 are on main. All 2239 tests pass, typecheck clean. Diff is correctly scoped to 6 files (app-store, repo-switcher, url-state-sync + their tests). Implementation uses a localStorage sentinel value to distinguish intentional all-repos from unset, and the URL restore path preserves existing search params including view. No regressions detected; lint errors are pre-existing.
